MINI MINUTES: JUDITH W. MARSH, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL-CIVIL FOR PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD PUENTE.
APPEARANCE: Judith W. Marsh, Esq. 510/444-4464 X320 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf; pltf Clifford Puente, also present.
RULING: In camera hearing held in chambers. The Court finds good cause to grant the motion. Counsel to submit proposed order. Court requests that order include language that City Attorney give plaintiff reasonable time (45 days from notice of entry of order) to respond to discovery/delay any motions so that plaintiff can seek new counsel. Counsel to deliver file to plaintiff. Court sealed record/transcript of this proceeding, and cannot be unsealed without Court order. (302/REQ/ju) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
